title: GoalTracker
intent: Goal planning and progress tracking with automated coaching nudges
requirements: goals module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
plans module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
progress module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
nudges module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
milestones module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
contributions module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
